description: Measure renal parenchymal thickness at three standardized locations (anterior, posterior, and lateral) for each kidney at the hilar level on the provided abdominal CT. Classify each kidney and assess bilateral symmetry. Save measurement markups to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/renal_thickness_measurements.mrk.json and save a report to ~/Documents/SlicerData/AMOS/renal_parenchyma_report.json with fields for right_kidney (anterior_mm, posterior_mm, lateral_mm, average_mm, classification), left_kidney (anterior_mm, posterior_mm, lateral_mm, average_mm, classification), bilateral_difference_mm, symmetry_assessment, and overall_impression.
